name: Tower Stack
description: Stack blocks as high as you can! Blocks swing back and forth — tap to drop. Overhangs get sliced off, making each block narrower. Land perfect stacks to earn combos and grow your block back!

contributions.Elanor Brightloom: Requested neon/dark cosmic theme with gradient blocks — awaiting specific response
contributions.Míriel Goldthread: Requested animation direction for block landings and particle effects — awaiting specific response
contributions.Narvi Irondeep: Requested logic review for edge cases (slicing, combo system) — awaiting specific response
